title: Budget & Performance
description: View the Department's most recent budget request to Congress and other financial performance documents.
text:
Agency Financial Report
Organized by three major sections: Management’s Discussion and Analysis, Financial Results, and Other Information
Performance
Provides summary and detailed results associated with the department’s performance goals and associated annual targets that align to budget activities
